channel.title: Artem Gordinskiy's Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content on Artem Gordinskiy's Personal Website

item.title: About me
item.description: Hey there, My name is Artem Gordinskiy. It’s been a while since I had an actual website instead of relying solely on Twitter and Instagram for self-expression. Thanks to The Pandemic, I had some free time to buy this ridiculous domain name and whip something up using Hugo and GitHub Pages. Feels good having my own little corner “on the interwebs” again. Not sure how best to characterise myself, but I guess I’m just an average nerd from Ukraine.

item.title: Finding a new job during a global pandemic
item.description: If you’re reading the title of this post and thinking to yourself “A pandemic? That’s so 2020!” — then congrats, you’ve made it, humanity! Alas, as I’m writing this in late 2020, most of the world’s developers (and, pretty much, everyone else who can) are still staying away from their companies' offices and working from home in an attempt to flatten the curve of COVID19 infections. If you were to ask everyone in the world to give 2020 a Yelp review then… let’s just say this year won’t top any charts.

The Process “The most important idea is simply focusing out and avoiding conscious choices while improvising.” “After all was said and done, the process we developed boils down to three major points. The first is to explore and heighten a point of concentration (POC). A POC gives us action instead of just activities. We learn to focus out, make discoveries, and react to those discoveries. The second is to explore and heighten a point of view (POV).
